Demo of a prototype I'm working on to play with structure editors and ways to make WebAssembly easier to understand.

text: <@US370TRJA> no direct link unfortunately. Its from a steam page: <https://store.steampowered.com/app/2455360/Cooking_Simulator_2_Better_Together/|https://store.steampowered.com/app/2455360/Cooking_Simulator_2_Better_Together/> . I should have mentioned him actually :sweat: He's Dawid Ignar. He was an art director for that game and is doing some freelancing now.

attachments.fallback: Cooking Simulator 2: Better Together on Steam
attachments.text: Cooking Simulator is back – bigger, better, and with optional multiplayer! Create your own recipes and take advantage of new and improved controls to become the best restaurant cook in the city! Or just have fun and enjoy cooking at your own pace. You’re the chef here!
attachments.title: Cooking Simulator 2: Better Together on Steam

attachments.fallback: Cooking Simulator 2: Better Together - Blueprints: The Ultimate Recipe for Creativity - Playtest - Steam News
attachments.text: Chefs of the world - get ready. In Cooking Simulator 2: Better Together, we’ve taken another step. This time, you’re not just following recipes…you’re writing them. Join Playtest.
